# PERF-185 negative: Content-Type is read from the request header
lang: go
file: PERF-185-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if t := r.Header.Get("Content-Type"); t != "" {
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", t)
	}
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
